name: Home Loan Advantage
description_short: San Diego-based mortgage lender offering residential home purchases and refinances with claims of competitive rates, flexible loan options, and fast approval times.
description_long:
Home Loan Advantage is a full-service mortgage company based in San Diego, California, serving the San Diego and Los Angeles County markets. The company specializes in residential real estate financing for all property types throughout California, positioning itself as a solution for borrowers regardless of credit profile. Founded and operated by NMLS-licensed loan officers Leon Felcher (#1056880) and Ryan Greenhalgh (#2173068), the firm emphasizes personalized service and accessibility to its application process.

The company offers standard mortgage products including home purchase loans, refinancing services, and cash-out refinance options. According to their website, they advertise competitive interest rates, flexible loan programs, maximum cash-out options, no-closing-cost loan programs, and rapid approval timelines of 24-48 hours. They claim to work with borrowers of varying credit profiles and market their service as streamlined and transparent throughout the lending process.

Home Loan Advantage distinguishes itself primarily through direct loan officer relationships and customer testimonials highlighting personalized service. Customer reviews specifically praise Leon Felcher for availability, going "the extra mile," and delivering competitive rates and fast closings. The company emphasizes transparency in the lending process and willingness to work with borrowers who have had previous negative lending experiences. Their marketing focuses on simplicity and accessibility rather than specialization in niche mortgage products.

As a regional mortgage lender with limited online presence beyond a basic website, this company operates at a smaller scale than national lenders. While customer testimonials are positive, there is no publicly available information regarding loan volume, approval rates, complaint history, or verification of their rate competitiveness claims. The company's service area appears limited to California, and specific loan program details, fees, and rate sheets are not disclosed on their website.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Fast loan approvals advertised at 24-48 hours
Direct access to named NMLS-licensed loan officers (Leon Felcher, Ryan Greenhalgh)
Stated flexibility on credit profiles and willingness to work with borrowers
Customer testimonials describe high availability and responsiveness from loan officers
Claims competitive interest rates with specific customer savings examples ($600/month mentioned)
cons: Limited service area restricted to California (San Diego and Los Angeles County focus)
No published rate sheets, fee schedules, or loan program details on website
Claims of 'lowest interest rates in the industry' are unverifiable and not substantiated
Small regional lender with no transparency on loan volume, approval rates, or regulatory complaint history
Website lacks specific information on loan types offered (FHA, VA, jumbo, etc.)
best_for: California homeowners seeking refinancing with hands-on loan officer service
San Diego and Los Angeles County home buyers preferring direct relationships over automated lenders
Borrowers with non-perfect credit seeking alternative mortgage options
diagnosis: Home Loan Advantage is best for California-based homeowners in San Diego/Los Angeles County who value direct loan officer relationships and personalized service over online convenience. The main caveat is that their rate and program competitiveness cannot be independently verified, and their limited geographic footprint and minimal online disclosure mean they are not suitable for borrowers outside California or those seeking transparent, publicly comparable lending terms.
services: Flexible loan options for various credit profiles
Rate quotes and personalized loan consultations
Residential real estate financing for multiple property types
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 717 Union St K, San Diego, CA 92101
